title: ggen Validation Gates — Definition of Done
description: Complete specification of the 7 validation gates that must pass before artifacts are emitted. All gates are enforced across the μ₁–μ₅ pipeline.

gates.name: SHACL Validation
gates.description: RDF ontology shapes validation. Validates that the loaded RDF graph conforms to SHACL shape constraints defined in .specify/shapes/.

validation_rules.rule: All RDF triples must conform to declared SHACL shapes
validation_rules.enforcement: Hard fail if any shape constraint is violated
validation_rules.recovery: Inspect SHACL error output and fix RDF triple to match shape constraint

validation_rules.rule: Required properties must be present on all instances
validation_rules.enforcement: Hard fail if required property is missing
validation_rules.recovery: Add missing property with valid value or adjust shape constraints

validation_rules.rule: Property value types must match SHACL datatype constraints
validation_rules.enforcement: Hard fail on type mismatch
validation_rules.recovery: Convert property value to correct datatype or relax constraint

strict.behavior: Halt on SHACL constraint violation (no change)

automation: Pre-commit hook: `scripts/hooks/pre-commit.sh` runs `ggen validate`
CI gate: Must pass before merge to main
Sync gate: `ggen sync` halts if SHACL validation fails
gates.evidence: SHACL validation report with per-shape conformance results; OTEL span with violations count

gates.name: Profile Enforcement (Strict Mode)
gates.description: Validates output artifacts against marketplace profile constraints (Draft/Published state, immutability, trust requirements, receipt specifications). Prevents artifact emission if profile constraints are violated.
gates.command: Part of `ggen sync` pipeline; explicit check via `ggen lsp check --profile`

diagnostic_codes.recovery: Change profile to Draft state or remove constraint from ggen.toml

diagnostic_codes.description: Pack immutability violated (published pack was modified)
diagnostic_codes.recovery: Bump semantic version of pack or revert changes to published state
Update manifest schema version to match profile requirement or regenerate manifest

validation_rules.rule: Published packs cannot be modified without version bump
validation_rules.enforcement: Hard fail if published pack hash differs from locked hash
validation_rules.recovery: Bump pack version in ggen.toml or `.ggen/packs.lock` and rebuild

validation_rules.rule: Strict mode enforces all profile constraints
validation_rules.enforcement: Hard fail on any constraint violation when `[validation] strict_mode = true`
validation_rules.recovery: Enable permissive profile or remove constraint

validation_rules.rule: Trust requirements must be satisfied
validation_rules.enforcement: Hard fail if pack trust level insufficient for output category
validation_rules.recovery: Add signature/receipt or increase pack trust level

validation_rules.rule: Receipt specification must match emitted receipt structure
validation_rules.enforcement: Hard fail if receipt fields do not match profile spec
validation_rules.recovery: Update profile receipt_spec or ensure receipt contains all required fields

basic.behavior: Log profile violations but continue to emission

strict.behavior: Block artifact emission on any profile violation

automation: Sync gate: `ggen sync` evaluates profile before μ₅ emit
LSP diagnostic: GGEN-PROFILE-* codes appear in editor if violation detected
CI gate: Strict mode enforced on main branch
gates.evidence: Profile enforcement report listing all constraints and pass/fail per constraint; OTEL span with violation count

gates.name: SPARQL Conformance (Law Surfaces)
gates.description: Validates SPARQL queries against law surfaces: (1) provision checks (GGEN-OUT-001), (2) SPARQL laws (E0010–E0015), (3) Tera template integration (GGEN-TPL-001, E0024).

diagnostic_codes.meaning: Tera template consumes {{var}} that SPARQL SELECT does not produce
diagnostic_codes.recovery: Add missing ?var to SPARQL SELECT projection or remove from template

diagnostic_codes.meaning: output_file pattern consumes unbound variable not in SELECT projection
diagnostic_codes.recovery: Ensure all {{vars}} in output_file are in SPARQL SELECT or add to SELECT

diagnostic_codes.meaning: SELECT * used (disables provision checks; all downstream bindings unverifiable)
diagnostic_codes.recovery: Replace SELECT * with explicit variable list (?var1, ?var2, ...)

diagnostic_codes.meaning: VALUES clause forbidden in external .rq files (only inline in ggen.toml allowed)
diagnostic_codes.recovery: Move VALUES data to ggen.toml [[rule.data]] section or inline SPARQL

diagnostic_codes.meaning: CONSTRUCT query lacks ORDER BY (determinism concern)
diagnostic_codes.recovery: Add ORDER BY clause with stable sort key (?subject, ?predicate, ?object recommended)

diagnostic_codes.meaning: SELECT query lacks ORDER BY (determinism concern)
diagnostic_codes.recovery: Add ORDER BY clause or justify determinism via HASH or LIMIT

diagnostic_codes.meaning: Identity CONSTRUCT detected (triple pattern returns same triples unchanged; no-op transformation)
diagnostic_codes.recovery: Modify CONSTRUCT pattern to transform triples or remove rule if intentionally no-op

diagnostic_codes.meaning: Tera template syntax error (invalid Tera markup)
diagnostic_codes.recovery: Fix Tera syntax; verify {{var}} delimiters, filters, and control flow

validation_rules.rule: All Tera template variables must be in SPARQL SELECT projection
validation_rules.enforcement: Hard fail on provision check failure (GGEN-TPL-001)
validation_rules.recovery: Add missing variable to SELECT ?vars or remove from template

validation_rules.rule: All output_file pattern variables must be in SPARQL SELECT projection
validation_rules.enforcement: Hard fail on unbound output path (GGEN-OUT-001)
validation_rules.recovery: Bind all variables in output_file to SPARQL SELECT

validation_rules.rule: SPARQL queries must use explicit SELECT when ORDER BY required for determinism
validation_rules.enforcement: Warning by default; ERROR in strict mode
validation_rules.recovery: Add ORDER BY clause with stable sort key

validation_rules.rule: VALUES clause only allowed inline in ggen.toml, not in external .rq files
validation_rules.enforcement: Hard fail on E0010
validation_rules.recovery: Move VALUES to ggen.toml [[rule.data]] or inline SPARQL

validation_rules.rule: Tera template syntax must be valid
validation_rules.enforcement: Hard fail on E0024 (parse error)
validation_rules.recovery: Fix template syntax; test with Tera validator

basic.severity: ERROR for provision checks, WARNING for SPARQL laws
basic.behavior: E0011/E0013 are warnings; other codes halt

strict.behavior: E0011/E0013 promoted to ERROR; all violations halt

automation: Pre-commit hook: `ggen lsp check --all` validates all SPARQL/Tera
LSP diagnostics: Codes appear in editor as user types
Sync gate: `ggen sync` halts if provision checks fail
gates.evidence: LSP diagnostic report with all GGEN-*/E-codes; OTEL span with violation counts; ability to link violation to line/char in ggen.toml or .rq file

gates.name: Type-Level Validation (Rust Compiler)
gates.description: Rust compiler checks + clippy lints. Validates: (1) Zero compiler errors, (2) Zero unwrap/expect in production, (3) Zero unsafe blocks outside audit boundaries, (4) All fallible operations return Result<T, CrateError>, (5) No todo!() in committed code.
gates.implementation_file: Compile time (no specific file; enforced by Cargo.toml and lint config)

validation_rules.rule: Zero compiler errors (E0xxx)
validation_rules.enforcement: Hard fail on any E0xxx compiler error
validation_rules.recovery: Fix compiler error by addressing type mismatch, missing implementation, or borrow checker violation

validation_rules.rule: No unwrap() or expect() in production code (crates/*/src/)
validation_rules.enforcement: Hard fail on clippy lint `clippy::unwrap_used` in production
validation_rules.recovery: Replace with Result<T, E> handling or match expression; use unwrap only in tests

validation_rules.rule: No unsafe blocks outside audit boundaries
validation_rules.enforcement: Hard fail on unsafe without explicit `// SAFETY:` comment and audit marker
validation_rules.recovery: Remove unsafe or move to explicitly audited module with SAFETY comment

validation_rules.rule: All I/O, parsing, and FFI operations must return Result<T, CrateError>
validation_rules.enforcement: Type system enforces Result return; missing ? operator caught by compiler
validation_rules.recovery: Propagate error with ? operator or handle explicitly

validation_rules.rule: No todo!(), unimplemented!(), or panic!() in committed code
validation_rules.enforcement: Caught by clippy lint `clippy::todo` and code review
validation_rules.recovery: Implement function or mark with #[cfg(test)] or #[allow(dead_code)]

validation_rules.rule: No clippy warnings in production code
validation_rules.enforcement: Hard fail on any clippy warning (not just errors)
validation_rules.recovery: Fix underlying issue or add justified #[allow(...)] with SAFETY comment

basic.behavior: Compiler errors block compilation; warnings non-blocking

strict.behavior: All warnings treated as errors (via RUSTFLAGS=-D warnings)

automation: Pre-commit hook: `just check` gates all commits
CI gate: `cargo build --workspace` required before merge
Pre-push hook: Full compilation required before push
gates.evidence: Compiler output showing zero errors; `cargo build --workspace 2>&1 | tail -5` showing 'Finished release'

gates.name: Diagnostic Codes Resolution (LSP Diagnostics)
gates.description: All active GGEN-* diagnostic codes must be resolved (no errors) before artifacts are emitted. 11 diagnostic species are registered; all active detectors must report zero violations.
gates.command: ggen lsp check --all; implicit check during `ggen sync`

validation_rules.rule: All ERROR-severity codes must have zero violations before emission
validation_rules.enforcement: Hard fail in strict mode; warning in basic mode
validation_rules.recovery: Run suggested repair routes or manually fix root cause

validation_rules.rule: All WARNING-severity codes should be resolved (advisory)
validation_rules.enforcement: Warning in both modes; non-blocking
validation_rules.recovery: Resolve if possible; suppress with justification if intentional

validation_rules.rule: Diagnostic species table is authoritative (11 active species)
validation_rules.enforcement: Only codes in diagnostic_species.rs are recognized; others ignored
validation_rules.recovery: Add new code to species table if needed

validation_rules.rule: Each diagnostic species has a repair route
validation_rules.enforcement: Diagnostic must map to a route (source_law_repair, security_repair, proof_topology_repair, advisory)
validation_rules.recovery: Follow route guidance to repair

basic.behavior: Diagnostics are logged but do not block emission

strict.behavior: Block emission on any unresolved ERROR-severity diagnostic

automation: LSP: Diagnostics appear in editor as you type
LSP check: `ggen lsp check --all` reports all active diagnostics
Sync gate: `ggen sync` collects diagnostics before μ₅ emit and blocks if strict mode enabled
gates.evidence: LSP diagnostic output showing zero active ERROR codes (or acceptable WARNING codes); OTEL span with diagnostic counts

gates.name: Output Layer Validation (Yield Gate)
gates.description: Validates output file paths do not escape the project root. Prevents directory traversal attacks (../ escaping) and ensures all artifacts stay within boundaries. Enforces GGEN-YIELD-001 (path escaping), GGEN-YIELD-003 (orphaned output), GGEN-YIELD-004 (competing authority), GGEN-YIELD-005 (remote fetch).
gates.command: Implicit in `ggen sync`; explicit validation via `ggen sync --validate-only`

diagnostic_codes.meaning: output_file escapes project root (contains ../ or absolute path)
diagnostic_codes.recovery: Remove ../ and use relative paths; ensure all artifacts stay within project directory

diagnostic_codes.meaning: output_file has no static filename base (entirely dynamic path would create orphaned artifacts)
diagnostic_codes.recovery: Ensure output_file has static prefix or ensures unique file per run

diagnostic_codes.meaning: Multiple rules target the same output_file (conflicting writes)
diagnostic_codes.recovery: Consolidate rules or ensure each rule targets distinct output file

diagnostic_codes.meaning: output_file is a URL (cannot write to remote location)
diagnostic_codes.recovery: Convert to local relative path; fetch remote content separately if needed

validation_rules.rule: No ../ in output_file paths
validation_rules.enforcement: Hard fail on path normalization revealing ../ escape
validation_rules.recovery: Remove ../ and use relative paths within project

validation_rules.rule: No absolute paths in output_file
validation_rules.enforcement: Hard fail on absolute path detection (/root/..., C:\...)
validation_rules.recovery: Use relative paths only

validation_rules.rule: output_file must normalize to within project root
validation_rules.enforcement: Path canonicalization must show output within project directory
validation_rules.recovery: Adjust relative path to stay within bounds

validation_rules.rule: No orphaned outputs (fully dynamic path with no static base)
validation_rules.enforcement: Hard fail if output_file is entirely {{var}} with no static prefix
validation_rules.recovery: Add static prefix: e.g., 'generated/{{name}}.rs' instead of '{{path}}/{{name}}.rs'

validation_rules.rule: No multiple rules writing to same output_file
validation_rules.enforcement: Hard fail on authority conflict detection
validation_rules.recovery: Consolidate overlapping rules or adjust output file paths

validation_rules.rule: No URLs in output_file
validation_rules.enforcement: Hard fail on scheme detection (http://, https://, ftp://)
validation_rules.recovery: Use relative filesystem paths

basic.behavior: Halt on any yield gate violation

strict.behavior: Halt on any yield gate violation (no change)

automation: Sync gate: `ggen sync` validates all output paths in μ₅ before writing
Pre-emit: Paths validated before any file is written to disk
Atomic write: AtomicFileWriter typestate prevents partial writes on validation failure
gates.evidence: Validated path list showing all output paths and their canonical resolved form (all within project root); OTEL span confirming zero escapes

gates.name: Determinism Validation (Hash Verification)
gates.description: Validates reproducible builds via cryptographic hash verification. Ensures that identical inputs produce identical outputs. Validates input hashes, output hashes, receipt signatures, and detects non-deterministic sources (UUIDs, timestamps, random).

diagnostic_codes.meaning: Output hash changed with identical inputs (sources are non-deterministic)
diagnostic_codes.recovery: Audit code for non-deterministic sources (UUID generation, timestamps, random, system time); replace with deterministic values

diagnostic_codes.meaning: Input hash missing or empty in lockfile (pack digest not computed at install)
diagnostic_codes.recovery: Re-run pack install with digest computation; verify digest field is non-empty SHA-256

diagnostic_codes.meaning: Receipt signature empty (receipt was not signed with Ed25519 key)
diagnostic_codes.recovery: Verify Ed25519 key exists at .ggen/keys/signing.key; re-run ggen sync to re-generate signed receipt

diagnostic_codes.meaning: Output ordering non-deterministic (SPARQL result set lacks ORDER BY)
diagnostic_codes.recovery: Add ORDER BY to SPARQL query with stable sort key

validation_rules.rule: Identical inputs must produce identical outputs (hash equality)
validation_rules.enforcement: Hard fail in strict mode if output hash differs from prior run with same inputs
validation_rules.recovery: Audit for non-deterministic sources: Uuid::new_v4(), SystemTime::now(), random(), thread-local state

validation_rules.rule: All input files must have non-empty SHA-256 hashes in lockfile
validation_rules.enforcement: Hard fail if input_hashes contains empty string or null
validation_rules.recovery: Re-compute hashes; verify pack digest computed at install time

validation_rules.rule: Receipt must be signed with Ed25519 private key
validation_rules.enforcement: Hard fail if signature field is empty; verification fails
validation_rules.recovery: Ensure .ggen/keys/signing.key exists; run ggen sync to generate signed receipt

validation_rules.rule: Receipt signature must verify against Ed25519 public key
validation_rules.enforcement: Hard fail on `ggen receipt verify` if signature is invalid
validation_rules.recovery: Ensure receipt and key match; regenerate receipt if key was changed

validation_rules.rule: SPARQL queries must use ORDER BY for deterministic result sets
validation_rules.enforcement: Warning by default; ERROR in strict mode
validation_rules.recovery: Add ORDER BY (?s, ?p, ?o) or other stable sort key

validation_rules.rule: No non-deterministic values (UUIDs, timestamps, random) in templates
validation_rules.enforcement: Hard fail if GGEN-DETERM-001 detected on re-run
validation_rules.recovery: Replace Uuid::new_v4() with fixed UUID or hash-based deterministic ID

strict.behavior: Block emission on any determinism violation

automation: Post-emit: `ggen sync` generates receipt with input/output hashes and Ed25519 signature
Receipt verification: `ggen receipt verify <path>` checks signature and hash chain
Audit mode: `ggen sync --audit true` runs determinism checks and compares to prior runs
gates.evidence: Receipt with non-empty input_hashes, output_hashes, and valid Ed25519 signature; `ggen receipt verify` returning is_valid: true; OTEL span showing zero determinism violations
gates.test_proof: File: crates/ggen-core/tests/determinism_validation_test.rs; command: ggen sync --audit true && ggen receipt verify .ggen/receipts/latest.json

development_loop: ggen lsp check --all          # Gate 3, 5: SPARQL conformance + diagnostics
full_validation: ggen validate spec.ttl        # Gate 1: SHACL validation
ggen sync --validate-only     # Gates 2, 6, 7: Profile, yield, determinism pre-check
sync_and_emit: ggen sync --audit true        # Gates 1-7: Full validation + receipt generation
ggen receipt verify .ggen/receipts/latest.json  # Verify receipt signature

required_fields.validation: Must be valid UUID; must not be zero UUID
Must be valid RFC-3339 timestamp; must be recent (within last 24h of run)
All values must be 64-char hex strings; must include all consumed files
All values must be 64-char hex strings; must include all emitted files
Must be non-empty base64; must verify against public key .ggen/keys/verifying.key
Must list all active GGEN-* codes with zero error-severity violations

receipt_proof_requirements.verification_output: is_valid: true, signature_verified: true, hash_chain_intact: true

before_claiming_completion: OTEL spans exist for the operation being validated (RUST_LOG=trace cargo test)
All required attributes are populated with real values (non-zero tokens, real latency)
Token counts and timing are consistent with real external calls (not synthetic values)
Error spans appear if operation failed, with error=true and meaningful message
Spans show network latency (2-3 seconds for LLM, milliseconds for local ops, not instant)

all_gates_must_pass: ggen lsp check --all                    # Gate 3, 5: SPARQL conformance + diagnostics
ggen sync --validate-only               # Gates 2, 6, 7: Profile, yield, determinism pre-check
just test                               # All tests pass (Chicago TDD)
ggen sync --audit true                  # Full validation + receipt generation
ggen receipt verify .ggen/receipts/latest.json  # Receipt signature valid
evidence_required: Receipt file: .ggen/receipts/latest.json with all required fields
Signature verification: ggen receipt verify returns is_valid: true
OTEL spans: RUST_LOG=trace shows pipeline.* spans for all 7 gates
Test output: All tests pass with Chicago TDD (no mocks, real collaborators)
No Andon signals: Zero compiler errors, test failures, clippy warnings
